name: Herb Warszawy
description: Coat of arms of Warsaw (Herb Warszawy), the capital city of Poland. Features the legendary Warsaw Mermaid (Syrenka Warszawska) armed with a golden sword and a small golden shield on a crimson field, crowned with a royal crown. The coat of arms was officially confirmed in 1622. The motto «Semper Invicta» (Always Unconquered) appears on the full (great) version.
svg:

    d="M18 18 H182 V155 Q100 238 100 238 Q100 238 18 155 Z"

metadata.blazon: Gules, a mermaid argent, scaled and finned or, crowned or, holding in the dexter hand a sword erect or and in the sinister a roundel gules.
